textByHashes.8222ebe9219e8737cb037850a45712288baadad0: I suppose you've earned the right to know. My name is Cam the Camel.
textByHashes.95dadc445405463d9c5fc1625464ded950c1af31: I'm glad I met a kind adventurer such as yourself. I look forward to seeing you continue your diligent work in cleansing this tomb of the Devourer's corruption.
textByHashes.1ee17defb883395023bc9e8c2f8de3cc37df586d: As I said, my name is Cam the Camel.
textByHashes.7d7814e5286eef565b5a6ee5dd29e224c3e4b721: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.
textByHashes.c07bced09b02baeb2689815708b062d6dd5f6ee4: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!
textByHashes.68357b5792c5ae00fee22c5c8a2c6e925b46fd55: I hope that's what you wanted!
textByHashes.8e575ed4ba0cd341a707db34c897e1ef0f521a0b: The weather's really hot, don't you think?
textByHashes.a39f31571e08dd2186ba6428a3a1b2dc02583b9d: Are you joking? It's burning hot out here! Sitting by the oasis is the only way to stay cool.
textByHashes.c9dbe5b233716f3890886febfd57969934dce648: It's never enough. And it's always far too hot to go anywhere in the desert.
textByHashes.d61a4878dd62ba123885b3ef5be7e4eb7a00d301: Sometimes I wish I could go travelling in cooler places, like all those adventurers I see passing through here.
textByHashes.c2be20c291f0f354848f76e408dac736c043fec3: In that case, I'll just stay by this nice cool oasis.
